case_title: RICHARD W RIEDEL VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIEDEL, RICHARD W AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIEDEL, RICHARD W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.53 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,237.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
